name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Met during freshman year at Stanford. We bonded over late-night study sessions and weekend hiking trips in the Bay Area.

name: Alex Johnson
bio: My former team lead who taught me everything about software architecture. We still grab coffee monthly.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Grew up on the same street. We've traveled to 8 countries together and counting. Planning our next trip to Japan.

name: Marcus Williams
bio: Lives two doors down. We hit the gym together every morning at 6 AM and compete in local 5K runs.

name: Emily Chen
bio: Our weekly book club discussions are legendary. She's a published author and always recommends the best reads.

name: David Park
bio: Best roommate I ever had. Now he's a data scientist in Seattle, but we still game online every Friday night.

name: Olivia Torres
bio: We survived three company reorganizations together. Our lunch breaks kept us sane through it all.

name: James Cooper
bio: Our families have been close for over 20 years. He coached my little league team and we still watch every playoff game together.

name: Sophia Turner
bio: Met at a fitness class. We’ve been pushing each other to stay healthy and positive.

name: Liam Smith
bio: Liam and I were study partners through college. We’ve made a tradition of doing finals together.

name: Olivia Davis
bio: My cousin, who we travel with every year. I haven't seen her since our last holiday trip to Italy.

name: Ethan Wilson
bio: Ethan and I started a gardening club in our neighborhood. We exchange tips and seeds often.

name: Mia Harris
bio: My old college roommate. We haven't spoken since graduation, but we used to spend endless nights chatting and binge-watching shows.

name: Lucas Brown
bio: Lucas is my team lead at the new job. We work on several big projects together and still manage to grab lunch every week.

name: Charlotte Miller
bio: I grew up with Charlotte. We’ve gone through thick and thin, and although we haven’t spoken in a while, we still keep in touch occasionally.
